message:
feat: implement complete scrollable sections configuration interface

Delivers clean scrollable configuration with all sections working:

Scrollable Sections Layout:
- Container Runtime section (docker/podman selection)
- Credentials section (SSH, GitHub CLI, GPG, npm, AWS toggles)
- Default Container section (image, update checking, frequency)
- Clean sectioned organization with visual headers

Navigation:
- ↑/↓ arrows navigate through ALL fields across all sections
- Enter activates toggles, selects, and text fields
- Down past last field reaches Save/Cancel buttons
- ←/→ arrows select between Save/Cancel buttons
- 's' saves, 'q' cancels

Features:
- ✅ No content jumping - fixed-width titles and consistent cursor
- ✅ Always-visible descriptions - help text never vanishes
- ✅ Professional colored toggles (green ON / gray OFF)
- ✅ All configuration options in logical sections
- ✅ Custom container image support (any registry)
- ✅ Update frequency control (6h, 12h, 24h, 48h, weekly)
- ✅ Safe config preservation of unshown settings

Expected Interface:
    packnplay Configuration

Container Runtime
    > Container Runtime                   docker
      Choose which container CLI to use

Credentials
      SSH keys                           ON
      Mount ~/.ssh (read-only) for SSH authentication

      GitHub CLI credentials             OFF
      Mount gh config for GitHub operations

Default Container
      Container Image                    ghcr.io/obra/packnplay-default:latest
      Default container image to use (supports any registry)

      Check for updates                  ON
      Auto-pull updates                  OFF
      Check frequency                    24h

This provides professional, stable configuration interface that's
intuitive and comprehensive without tab complexity.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
